message:
chore(fcp-core): regenerate CBOR test vectors with updated key material

Regenerate enrollment and simulation request CBOR test vectors after
key material rotation. The signing, encryption, and issuance key IDs
have changed, and simulation request UUIDs are refreshed. Binary
content is deterministic from the current key fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
